sql_array: CREATE TABLE players(`name` String, `score` UInt32, `team` String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY score;
SELECT name, score, percent_rank() OVER (PARTITION BY team ORDER BY score DESC) AS rank_percent FROM players;
UPDATE players SET score = score + 50 WHERE name = 'Bob';
SELECT team, AVG(score) AS average_score, percent_rank() OVER (ORDER BY AVG(score) DESC) AS team_rank FROM players GROUP BY team;
